news.summary: US Vice President JD Vance said Sunday there was a chance to “turn over a new leaf” with Iran as negotiators met in Switzerland to build on last week’s interim agreement. But President Donald Trump’s renewed threats over Iran-backed Hezbollah and the Strait of Hormuz – and Israel's refusal to withdr

news.headline: Colombia: Abelardo de la Espriella elected president, Iván Cepeda calls for awaiting final count
news.summary: According to preliminary results from Sunday's second round published by the national electoral authority, far-right candidate Abelardo de la Espriella is Colombia's president-elect. His left-wing rival Iván Cepeda announced that his campaign will contest results at 33,000 polling stations during th

news.headline: Mourners gather to remember Lebanese conservationist killed by Israel
news.summary: People gathered in Beirut in memory of beloved turtle conservationist Mona Khalil, killed in Israeli attack.

news.headline: Remembering Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah’s life’s work
news.summary: Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah dedicated his life to documenting life in Gaza before he was killed by Israel.

news.headline: Serena Williams to play women’s singles at Wimbledon as wildcard entrant
news.summary: The seven-time ladies' singles champion will make her Grand Slam return at Wimbledon, six years after her last appearance.

news.headline: Displaced Lebanese inspect shattered Nabatieh after Israel halts attacks
news.summary: Displaced residents returned to Nabatieh after Israel ordered a halt to fighting in southern Lebanon.

news.headline: Colombia elections take place as Abelardo de la Espriella leads polls
news.summary: Colombians are voting in an election where senator Ivan Cepeda is racing against Abelardo de la Espriella.

news.headline: Japan fans celebrate 4-0 World Cup win in Tokyo
news.summary: Fans gathered at Tokyo's Shibuya Crossing after Japan beat Tunisia 4-0 in a World Cup group-stage match.
